Teacher Kevin's Learning Arcade
⚙️ Teacher's Panel

✏️ Customize / AI Generator

⚠️ IMPORTANT:
The built-in AI generator may occasionally produce inaccurate or unnatural conversations because it is not connected to a third-party AI service. Teachers are strongly encouraged to review, edit, or create their own conversation dialogue before classroom use.







📁 My Conversations

Shows this teacher's saved drafts, pending submissions, approved posts, and rejected submissions.

📊 Student Progress Tools

Find a class, preview student progress, or download results as a PDF.

🌍 Community Library



🛡️ Admin Approval

Only the admin can view pending submissions. Teachers can use their own saved conversations immediately, but public Community Library posts need approval.

🗂️ Rejected Conversations

Rejected submissions stay here for 30 days. You can preview, restore to pending, or delete forever immediately.

Teacher Kevin's Learning Arcade

📝 Quick Quiz


📊 Class Progress Report

How To Play

1. Enter your nickname, student number, and class code.

2. Finish the conversation to earn 1 star.

3. Finish the quiz to earn 1 star.

4. Stars unlock fun badges.

5. The leaderboard only shows students from the same class code.
